node.text: These are not one day projects but you can try them over a few weekends instead of doomscrolling. I’m learning about the fifth slide projects.
There is absolutely no way y’all here pretending this is light work
@santan.jhay claude do these projects and make no mistake. There ya go
Exactly… CLAUDE did the project.
@santan.jhay it's not heavy work that's for sure
I just created ChatGPT from scratch. I can finally work as a Software Engineer at the local Beer Bar
Thank you. That’s what i needed
@python_dasturlash323 i will let you guys know and share the code. I am actually doing them.
Thank you 😊
Haha, 3 of them are in my to do. Great to see here. Those are some quality recommendations 🙌
Kaven is literally  goat
@a4mir__4 for real, a 16 year old with that level of understanding in Physics, Math and programming is remarkable 🔥
Anyone taking the challenge to complete🔥?
Gravity one is the hardest if you do it right
I'm done for the day
Doomscroll or recreate gravity?
@ik._47 عجيب.
No i prefer doom scrolling thanks
These projects are not beans
after simulating gravity make google earth from scartch, make no mistakes.
ML library in C from scratch😭 that's what the over candidate does on a random tuesday
create the world is more vulable project in the industry
All a completely useless example of reinventing the wheel. Go and recolor some buttons in React.
@uri.singer lol
have fun learning meanwhile others make money
Dude trust me there's more to software engineering than web dev
Saving these so I can make them in the near future (never)
Good list, also building an search engine from scratch is a great project
U da real projects
@plantsed11
@ceile.ee nagawa ko na gravity ah technically blackhole but samesame
@shubh.rawani
I've learnt HTML just, should I start applying in @google
@_its_ankit.vibes yes your resume already seems pretty solid, just learn Microsoft word and excel before applying
